remarks: Welcome to this charming two-bedroom single family home in the desirable Cove neighborhood. This well-maintained two-bedroom, one-full-bath home offers 844 square feet of comfortable living space with hardwood floors throughout and a spacious living room featuring a classic wood-burning fireplace. An additional sunroom/den provides the perfect space for a home office, reading area, or flexible use. The kitchen offers plenty of cabinetry and space. A full unfinished basement offers excellent storage. This home also features a full walk-up attic for even more convenient storage, along with a one-car detached garage with plenty of parking in the driveway and a private fenced backyard ideal for relaxing or entertaining. Perfectly located just moments from Cove Island Park, Cove Beach, Chelsea Piers, I-95, the train, and a variety of local restaurants, this home offers both comfort and convenience in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods. A true gem you won't want to miss. Come see for yourself!
